phoneticUs: 藞bl忙st蓹藢s瑟st; 藞bl忙sto蕣藢s瑟st
examples: The cells of this cluster inside next to the fluid-filled cavity is a region of the blastocyst called the inner cell mass.
The resulting hybrid grew into a tiny embryo known as a blastocyst, implanted into the womb of a surrogate mother, and went on to become Dolly.
The blastocyst will divide into two parts this week.
Even if the entire blastocyst had been implanted into a womb, it wouldn't have yielded a human clone.
That led to a blastocyst, a hollow ball of 50 to 100 cells.
